====Pokémon====
Similar to the games, Larry uses two completely different teams of Pokémon, one team for challenges as a Gym Leader and another for battles as an Elite Four member.

This listing is of Larry's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|HZ}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Flamigo 
|type1=Flying
|type2=Fighting
|img=Larry Flamigo Oricorio.png
|epnum=HZ055
|epname=Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Flamigo}} is Larry's first known Pokémon. It was used alongside {{p|Oricorio}} in his battle against [[Coral]] and [[Kofu]], only to be defeated when Coral's {{p|Glalie}} used {{m|Self-Destruct}}.

None of Flamigo's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Oricorio
|type1=Electric
|type2=Flying
|img=Larry Flamigo Oricorio.png
|epnum=HZ055
|epname=Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Oricorio}} is Larry's second known Pokémon. It was used alongside {{p|Flamigo}} in his battle against [[Coral]] and [[Kofu]], only to be defeated when Coral's {{p|Glalie}} used {{m|Self-Destruct}}.

None of Oricorio's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Dudunsparce
|type1=Normal
|img=Larry Dudunsparce.png
|epnum=HZ059
|epname=Dance, Quaxly! The Blue Medali Step!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Dudunsparce}} is Larry's third known Pokémon. It was used during Dot's [[Tera Training]] test, where it faced both {{p|Quaxly}} and {{TP|Dot|Tinkatink}}. It was able to gain the upper hand on Quaxly when it {{status|paralyzed}} him with Glare. It then battled Tinkatink before being recalled in favor of Staraptor after their attacks seemed evenly matched.

Dudunsparce's known moves are {{m|Glare}}, {{m|Boomburst}}, and {{m|Hyper Drill}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Staraptor
|tera=Normal
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Larry Staraptor.png
|cap=Larry's Staraptor
|img2=Larry Staraptor Terastal.png
|cap2=Larry's Terastallized Staraptor
|epnum=HZ059
|epname=Dance, Quaxly! The Blue Medali Step!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Staraptor}} is Larry's fourth known Pokémon and his ace. It was used to battle {{TP|Dot|Tinkatink}} and {{p|Quaxly}} during [[Dot]]'s [[Tera Training]] test battle, where it was swapped in to replace Dudunsparce and quickly defeated Tinkatink. Despite receiving major damage from Dot's newly evolved {{TP|Dot|Quaxwell}}, it was still able to defeat him after {{Tera}}stallizing while Quaxwell was immobilized by {{status|paralysis}}.

Staraptor's known moves are {{m|Wing Attack}}, {{m|Hurricane}}, {{m|Air Slash}}, and {{m|Facade}}.}}
